title: Visual 3D Mace
description: Adds a 3D mace model with visual enchantments
body:
**THIS PROJECT IS NOT AFFILIATED WITH OREVILLE STUDIOS**

**_This resource pack adds a 3D handheld mace inspired by Actions & Stuff, while maintaining its 2D sprite in the inventory, on the ground, and in item frames._**

It also has enchantment-specific models for each mace-specific enchantment.
- **Wind burst:** Animated wind swirling around the heavy core of the mace
- **Breach/Density:** Spikes on the sides of the heavy core
- **Unenchanted or none of the above**: Just heavy core

**Note:** There may be some visual issues regarding the wind-swirling effect with the enchantment glint. Therefore, it is recommended to adjust your enchantment glint strength in accessibility to 50% or less for optimal results

![Unenchanted mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b557cc95768a41378b935eccdeeff952afbcee1f.png)
![Fully enchanted mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4cf40e6cb55c56d5f74508b1e0e88f0a5d51461.png)
![2D sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1af18218158fbcf8fb65a4060fd71c499f8a8f08.png)
